basic_details.job_title: TISS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant Professor and Post Doctoral Fellow Posts
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Professor and Post Doctoral Fellow

age_limit.age_details: Below 35 years for Post Doctoral Fellow with relaxation for reserved categories.
age_limit.details: Post Doctoral Fellow: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer)/Women/PWD candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Law with NET/SLET or Ph.D. for Assistant Professor. Ph.D. in Law/Law and Economics/Law and Public Policy for Post Doctoral Fellow.
qualification.details: A Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade) in law from a recognised university. Cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR, or a similar test accredited by the UGC, like SLET/SET OR awarded a Ph. D. Degree in accordance with UGC Regulations, 2009 or 2016. Exemption from NET/SLET/SET for Ph.D. candidates registered prior to July 11, 2009, if Ph.D. awarded in regular mode, thesis evaluated by two external examiners, open viva voce conducted, and two research papers published from Ph.D. work (at least one in a refereed journal) and presented at least two papers in UGC/ICSSR/CSIR sponsored conferences. Ph. D degree from a foreign university/institution with a ranking among the top 500 in World University Ranking (QS, THE, or ARWU). Desirable: Interdisciplinary academic background or training, teaching experience at undergraduate and/or postgraduate levels, record of scholarly research, professional or field experience. | Ph.D. degree in Law/ Law and Economics/ Law and Public Policy/Any other interdisciplinary discipline with explicit focus on Law, Legislative and Legal aspects of Public Policy (Provisional Certificate may be accepted). General category candidates: minimum of 55% marks or equivalent at Postgraduate level. Relaxation of 5% for reserved categories. Desirable: Demonstrated research interest at the intersection of law and public policy, strong grounding in public law/regulatory law/policy analysis, evidence of quality research output, familiarity with interdisciplinary research methods, willingness to undertake academic coordination or programme administration, ability to work collaboratively.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Assistant Professor in Law and Public Policy

salary_details.pay_scale: Assistant Professor: Rs. 57700/- in Academic Pay level 10. Post Doctoral Fellow: Rs. 80,000 consolidated with annual increment.
salary_details.details: Assistant Professor: Entry pay of Rs. 57700/- in the Academic Pay level 10 as per 7th CPC. Post Doctoral Fellow: Rs. 80,000 consolidated with annual increment (if extended after one year) as per the Institute's norms.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the TISS Assistant Professor and Post Doctoral Fellow positions is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: For the Assistant Professor position, candidates must possess a Master's degree in Law with NET/SLET or a Ph.D. degree. Specific exemptions and additional criteria are detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Post Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Post Doctoral Fellow position is below 35 years. However, age relaxation is provided for candidates belonging to reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How much is the application fee for TISS recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General, OBC, and EWS candidates is Rs. 1000/-. SC, ST, PWD, and Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: The Assistant Professor will receive an entry pay of Rs. 57,700/- in Academic Pay Level 10 as per the 7th Central Pay Commission guidelines.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Post Doctoral Fellow?
faq.answer: The Post Doctoral Fellow will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 80,000/- per month, with an annual increment if the fellowship is extended beyond one year.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these TISS posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for both Assistant Professor and Post Doctoral Fellow positions will involve a presentation and an interview. Candidates are shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside India apply for these positions?
faq.answer: The notification states that the state is "Across India," implying that candidates from all over India are eligible. Specific details for international applicants, if any, would be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Is the application process online or offline?
faq.answer: The application process for the TISS recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official TISS website to fill out and submit their application forms.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It is highly recommended to download and read it thoroughly before applying.
